CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_Fa.label: CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_FancyThatPorygon
CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_Fa.raw_text: 我非常非常想要那个多边兽！\n可是老虎机太难赢了！$
CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_Fa.display_text:
我非常非常想要那个多边兽！
可是老虎机太难赢了！

CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_Ra.label: CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_RakedItInToday
CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_Ra.raw_text: 哇哈哈！我今天人品大爆发了哇！\n要是每天都像今天一样就好了……$
CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_Ra.display_text:
哇哈哈！我今天人品大爆发了哇！
要是每天都像今天一样就好了……

CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_We.label: CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_WeExchangeCoinsForPrizes
CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_We.raw_text: 你可以用硬代币和我们兑换奖品。$
CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_We.display_text: 你可以用硬代币和我们兑换奖品。

CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_Yo.label: CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_YouWantTM
CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_Yo.raw_text: 好的，你想要的是技能机{STR_VAR_2}？$
CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_Yo.display_text: 好的，你想要的是技能机{STR_VAR_2}？

CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_Ne.label: CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_NeedMoreCoins
CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_Ne.raw_text: 抱歉，你的代币不够兑换它哦。$
CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_Ne.display_text: 抱歉，你的代币不够兑换它哦。

CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_Oo.label: CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_OopsNotEnoughRoom
CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_Oo.raw_text: おきゃくさん もう もてないよ$
CeladonCity_GameCorner_PrizeRoom_Text_Oo.display_text: おきゃくさん もう もてないよ
